---
title: "In-class-activity-PT"
author: "Patrick Torralba"
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{r}

library(shiny)
library(ggplot2)
library(pwr)

# Define UI
ui <- fluidPage(
  titlePanel("Power Analysis Visualization"),
  
  sidebarLayout(
    sidebarPanel(
      numericInput("n", "Sample Size (n):", value = 30, min = 2, step = 1),
      numericInput("mu_alt", "True Population Mean (μ₁):", value = 0.5, step = 0.1),
      numericInput("sd", "Population SD (σ):", value = 1, min = 0.1, step = 0.1),
      sliderInput("alpha", "Significance Level (α):", min = 0.01, max = 0.20, value = 0.05, step = 0.01)
    ),
    
    mainPanel(
      h4("Calculated Power:"),
      verbatimTextOutput("power_val"),
      plotOutput("plotB"), # Showing raw data overlap first for intuition
      plotOutput("plotA")  # Showing the sampling distribution
    )
  )
)

# Define Server Logic
server <- function(input, output) {
  
  # Calculate effect size (Cohen's d)
  eff_size <- reactive({ abs(input$mu_alt / input$sd) })
  
  # Calculate Power
  pwr_obj <- reactive({
    pwr.t.test(n = input$n, d = eff_size(), sig.level = input$alpha, 
               type = "one.sample", alternative = "greater")
  })
  
  output$power_val <- renderText({
    paste0(round(pwr_obj()$power * 100, 2), "%")
  })
  
  # Plot B: Raw Data Distributions
  output$plotB <- renderPlot({
    ggplot(data.frame(x = c(-4, 4 + input$mu_alt)), aes(x = x)) +
      stat_function(fun = dnorm, args = list(mean = 0, sd = input$sd), aes(fill = "Null (μ=0)"), geom = "area", alpha = 0.3) +
      stat_function(fun = dnorm, args = list(mean = input$mu_alt, sd = input$sd), aes(fill = "Alt"), geom = "area", alpha = 0.3) +
      labs(title = "Plot B: Raw Population Distributions (Overlap)", x = "Value", y = "Density", fill = "Group") +
      theme_minimal()
  })
  
  # Plot A: Sampling Distributions (t-distribution)
  output$plotA <- renderPlot({
    df <- input$n - 1
    # Critical t-value
    t_crit <- qt(1 - input$alpha, df)
    # Non-centrality parameter
    ncp <- input$mu_alt / (input$sd / sqrt(input$n))
    
    p <- ggplot(data.frame(x = c(-4, ncp + 4)), aes(x = x)) +
      # Null Distribution
      stat_function(fun = dt, args = list(df = df), color = "black", size = 1) +
      # Alternative Distribution (Non-central t)
      stat_function(fun = dt, args = list(df = df, ncp = ncp), color = "blue", size = 1) +
      # Shading Power
      stat_function(fun = dt, args = list(df = df, ncp = ncp), 
                    xlim = c(t_crit, ncp + 4), geom = "area", fill = "blue", alpha = 0.5) +
      geom_vline(xintercept = t_crit, linetype = "dashed", color = "red") +
      annotate("text", x = t_crit, y = 0.2, label = "Critical Value", angle = 90, vjust = -0.5, color = "red") +
      labs(title = "Plot A: Test Statistic (Sampling Distribution)", x = "t-statistic", y = "Density") +
      theme_minimal()
    
    print(p)
  })
}

shinyApp(ui = ui, server = server)

```
